code:
fn double_positive(_ n: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  if n > 0
    Ok(2 * n)
  else
    Err("non-positive")
  end
end

fn add_ten(_ n: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  Ok(n + 10)
end

fn process(_ n: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  let d = double_positive(n)?
  let r = add_ten(d)?
  Ok(r)
end

fn run(_ n: Int) -> Unit
  match process(n)
  when Ok(v)
    println("result=#{v}")
  when Err(msg)
    println("error=#{msg}")
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  run(5)
  run(-3)
end
